artPrompt: An evocative scene of petty governance magic: a crooked civic medallion of ongoing power hovering and glowing ember-orange over a half-eaten snack on a folding table amid an election-night riot, its light marking whoever last ate as favored. A single bonfire glow gilds the floating charm and the crumbs, the feral square sinking into smoke-black shadow. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Snack Seniority Clause
subtitle: Municipal Ordinance 7½
text:
At the beginning of each upkeep, the player who ate most recently is the Mayor's Favorite until someone else eats.
The Mayor's Favorite may roll a d6 each turn; on a 4 or higher, create that many ½/½ red Crumb creature tokens, rounded toward the snack.
The player who ate least recently can't untap unless they take a bite of something right now.
flavorText: Governance is just snacks with extra steps.

extras.impossibleMath: ½/½ Crumb tokens rounded toward the snack
